title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Adds a method on ModuleResolver in js/modules/resolution.go that resolves the module dependency tree without executing code
1.2: Updates NewBundle in internal/js/bundle.go to accept a pre-built ModuleResolver parameter
1.3: Updates NewBundleFromArchive in internal/js/bundle.go to accept a pre-built ModuleResolver parameter
1.4: Updates New in internal/js/runner.go to accept a pre-built ModuleResolver parameter
1.5: Updates NewFromArchive in internal/js/runner.go to accept a pre-built ModuleResolver parameter
1.6: Replaces internal ModuleResolver creation with the externally provided resolver in internal/js/bundle.go
1.7: Adds a NewModuleResolver factory function in internal/js/bundle.go that creates a ModuleResolver independently before bundle creation
1.8: Updates both call sites in internal/cmd/test_load.go (the JS path calling js.New, the archive path calling js.NewFromArchive) to create a ModuleResolver externally and pass it to the runner
1.9: Calls LoadMainModule at both call sites in internal/cmd/test_load.go (the JS path, the archive path) to pre-load the module tree before passing the resolver to the runner
1.10: Removes the CompatibilityMode field from the compiler Options struct in internal/js/compiler/compiler.go
1.11: Removes the compatibilityMode field from the parsingState struct in internal/js/compiler/compiler.go
1.12: Decouples both internal helpers in internal/js/bundle.go (newCompiler, generateFileLoad) from the Bundle struct so they accept explicit parameters instead
1.13: Updates RunSourceData in ModuleSystem in js/modules/resolution.go to reuse the new module loading method instead of inline resolution
1.14: Fixes the 'ComaptibilityMode' typo to 'CompatibilityMode' in the deprecation warning in internal/cmd/test_load.go
1.15: Removes the compatibility mode override logic from NewBundleFromArchive in internal/js/bundle.go
2: Documentation Maintainability
3: Artifact Cleanup
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Duplicates the pwd nil-check from newBundle into test_load.go instead of using the source URL's parent directory directly
4.2: Inlines the compiler creation logic into NewModuleResolver instead of keeping newCompiler as a separate standalone function
